use_cases: Copy promotional or discount codes with visual feedback
Code snippet copy functionality for documentation sites
Verification code copying with confirmation animation
ai_summary: A minimalist copy button component with circular progress animation that provides visual feedback when code or text is copied to clipboard. Features a smooth transition from idle to copied state with a 4-second countdown indicator, supporting both light and dark themes. Ideal for code documentation, promotional code sharing, or any copy-to-clipboard use case requiring confirmation feedback.
